LanguageData.UB_SNS_prodigy.title: Child prodigy
LanguageData.UB_SNS_prodigy.description: At a young age, [PAWN_nameDef] was exceptional at writing and understanding advanced code. [PAWN_nameDef]'s code was so advanced, they were easily able to code turrets that could avoid friendly fire, and make robotic limbs that worked better than the top-of-the-line models.
